candidate_definition_hints.text: Lean and powerful adblocking solution for OpenWrt

adblock-lean is a low maintenance (almost set and forget), powerful and ultra-efficient adblocking solution for OpenWrt that **does not mandate any external dependencies** or introduce unnecessary bloat. It is **highly optimized for RAM & CPU efficiency** during blocklist downlo…
